section.heading: Biomedical Ethics Board; disbursement of funds, computation and disbursement of basic pay, and provision of financial management services and support by Library of Congress
section.chapeau: Effective October 1, 1988, and to continue thereafter, the Disbursing Officer of the Library of Congress is authorized to—

paragraph.content: disburse funds appropriated for the Biomedical Ethics Board;
compute and disburse the basic pay for all personnel of the Biomedical Ethics Board; and
provide financial management services and support to the Biomedical Ethics Board,

section.continuation: in the same manner as provided with respect to the Office of Technology Assessment under section 142f of this title.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation act:
